description: This workshop covers the Jito Solana client setup and its benefits for validators, led by Lucas from JITO. It explains how Jito enhances MEV extraction and provides a high-level overview of its infrastructure and onboarding process.
topic_summary: Introduction to Jito Solana client, its advantages for validators, and the technical workings of MEV extraction [t=2:8] to [t=384:48].
